name_en: 💰M12617 Top-tier Original Pooch Bag Dynamic Code This model. The Pooch Bag condenses Louis Vuitton classic design elements into a compact structure. The Monogram canvas body features vintage edging, leather is used for the top handle, handle attachments, and adjustable shoulder strap, creating a comfortable handheld and crossbody experience. The LV Lovers tag showcases Pharrell Williams' creative touch. 18.0 x 28.0 x 19.0 cm (L x H x W)
